violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of food contact surface * was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Cutting Board on Single door prep cooler needs resurfaced or replaced.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitizer solution for three compartment sink was not maintained at the proper concentration *.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not maintained in good repair. Ice buildup on ceiling in Walk-in-Freezer needs removed.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Observed ice chute on soda dispenser needs to be cleaned. -Observed powder build up in cappuccino dispenser.
Toilet facilities. — ---Observed toilet room used by women did not contain at least one covered waste receptacle.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
